arts.ttl: Matthijs de Ligt's perfect response to Bruno Fernandes' Man United prediction
arts.sum: Manchester United's new signing Matthijs de Ligt scored his first goal for the club in a comfortable 3-0 victory over Southampton in the Premier League

arts.ttl: What I saw Matthijs de Ligt do for Man United is the perfect response to Virgil van Dijk criticism
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United transfer news as United earn their second win of the Premier League season against Southampton

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag might have found his new Roy Keane after Man United victory
arts.sum: Manchester United returned to winning ways at Southampton on Saturday but it was more than just the result which will have pleased Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Southampton 0-3 Man Utd: Player ratings as Red Devils capitalise on Archer penalty miss
arts.sum: The Saints were the better side for much of the first half, but Cameron Archer's penalty miss proved critical as United went down the other end and scored twice within eight minutes of Andre Onana's save. After Matthijs de Ligt headed home the opener from an excellent Bruno Fernandes cross, Marcus Rashford doubled the Red Devils' lead with a pinpoint effort which beat the unsighted Ramsdale.

arts.ttl: Man Utd cruise past Southampton to claim all three points
arts.sum: Highlights from the Premier League match between Manchester United and Southampton.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'receive boost' in pursuit of Netherlands star
arts.sum: Manchester United have received a boost in their pursuit of Xavi Simons, as the 21-year-old reportedly no longer sees a future at Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: The Verdict: Man Utd won mental battle in Saints victory
arts.sum: Sky Sports' Eleanor Roper and Dan Long reflect on Manchester United's 3-0 win over Southampton.

arts.ttl: I spotted subtle Marcus Rashford change which hints at Man United redemption
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Marcus Rashford made the first steps towards redemption among the fans with a goal in the 3-0 victory over Southampton

arts.ttl: Ten Hag vs Garnacho: Was Man Utd star axed for liking Ronaldo criticism?
arts.sum: Ten Hag vs Garnacho: Was Man Utd star axed for liking Ronaldo criticism? Alejandro Garnacho was again caught liking a social media post critical of Erik ten Hag and he did not start in Manchester United's 3-0 win over Southampton.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford sends perfect message after Man United goal against Southampton
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford scored a much-needed goal for Manchester United on Saturday against Southampton to help Erik ten Hag's side earn a 3-0 win
